title: Looking for Category Manager at Livspace

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Livspace
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
